entries.speaker: dellen
lines:
Ashmark Foundry District, sixteen years. Now my
supply chain is "whatever someone drags in from the Wastes."

entries.speaker: dellen
lines:
I don't do credit. Can't afford to trust anyone's
tomorrow.

entries.speaker: tomas
lines:
I was at Oasis A a month ago. Ward light was steady.
When I left three days back, it was flickering. Ward stones
don't flicker.

entries.speaker: senna
lines:
The stone cracked. Three days ago. The keeper held
on longer than anyone thought possible.
